name: compiler
description: Invoke the Factory's Stage 5 PRD-to-WorkGraph compiler

prd_path.description: Path to the PRD markdown file under specs/prds/

mode.description: full = all 8 passes + Gate 1 + WorkGraph emission; dry-run = all 8 passes but no file writes; gate1-only = stops after Gate 1, emits only the Coverage Report

side_effects: emits intermediate artifacts per pass to .factory/intermediates/ (gitignored)
emits CoverageReport to specs/coverage-reports/ on every run
emits WorkGraph to specs/workgraphs/ on successful Gate 1

output_contract.on_gate1_fail: CoverageReport (overall: fail) written; NO WorkGraph emitted; exit code 10
output_contract.on_uncertainty: UncertaintyLedger written; compiler halts; exit code 20
output_contract.on_internal_error: error with pass number and artifact; exit code 1

pass.description: Run a single compiler pass. For debugging; not the normal pipeline.
